nasb.text: When Jesus came into Peter’s home, He saw his mother-in-law lying sick in bed with a fever.

esv.text: And when Jesus entered Peter’s house, he saw his mother-in-law lying sick with a fever.

cnv.text: 耶穌來到彼得家裡，看見他的岳母發燒，病在床上。

ccb.text: 耶稣来到彼得家，看见彼得的岳母正在发烧，躺在床上。

csbs.text: 耶稣来到彼得家，看见彼得的岳母正发烧躺着。
